subject: Swift-BAT triggers 1216743-1216748 are not astrophysical
submitter: Simone Dichiara at Pennsylvania State University <sbd5667@psu.edu>
body:
S. Dichiara (PSU) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Swift triggers 1216743, 1216745, 1216746, 1216747 and 1216748 were caused by a star track loss-of-lock  event, and are not interesting astrophysical events.
